title: Smoky Ramen with Charred Pork
description: A fusion of Japanese flavors and smoky undertones, this ramen dish features charred pork and fresh vegetables.

ingredients.name: Smoky Pork Shoulder
ingredients.notes: Slow-cooked in a sweet and smoky sauce

ingredients.name: Green Onions
ingredients.notes: Thinly sliced and used as garnish

instructions: Slow-cook the pork shoulder in a sweet and smoky sauce for 8 hours.
Cook the ramen noodles according to the package instructions.
Grill the scallions until charred and set aside.
Sauté the garlic and ginger in sesame oil until fragrant.
Add the soy sauce and brown sugar to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the cooked pork to the pan and stir to coat with the sauce.
To assemble the ramen, place noodles in a bowl and top with the pork, scallions, and green onions.
Garnish with sesame seeds and serve immediately.
